verificationNote: Requirements constructed from CSA Cloud Controls Matrix v4, NIST CSF 2.0, and Malaysia Act 854 (NACSA) obligations. CCM control IDs are from the public CSA CCM v4 specification. Verify against authoritative sources before use in formal assessments.
description: Master requirements index for cloud security. Requirements are organised by security domain -- each domain consolidates requirements from CSA CCM, NIST CSF, and applicable Malaysian regulatory obligations. Requirements are cross-referenced to standards, MITRE ATT&CK Cloud techniques, and CSP-specific implementation guidance.

domains.name: Identity and Access Management
domains.description: Authentication, authorisation, federation, privileged access, and service account management for cloud workloads

domains.name: Data Protection and Encryption
domains.description: Data classification, encryption at rest and in transit, data loss prevention, and secure data lifecycle management

domains.name: Network Security
domains.description: Virtual network design, segmentation, security groups, private connectivity, WAF, and DDoS protection

domains.name: Logging and Monitoring
domains.description: Cloud audit logging, SIEM integration, alerting, log retention, and threat detection services

domains.name: Incident Response
domains.description: Cloud incident response planning, forensic readiness, containment procedures, and regulatory notification

domains.name: Container Security
domains.description: Container image scanning, runtime security, registry hardening, and orchestrator security configuration

domains.name: Serverless Security
domains.description: Function security configuration, API gateway protection, and serverless dependency management

domains.name: Supply Chain and DevSecOps
domains.description: CI/CD pipeline security, dependency management, infrastructure as code scanning, and software bill of materials

domains.name: Key Management
domains.description: Cloud KMS usage, key rotation policies, HSM-backed keys for sensitive workloads, and bring-your-own-key strategies

domains.name: Configuration and Posture Management
domains.description: Cloud security posture management, CIS benchmark compliance, drift detection, and resource tagging governance

domains.name: Backup and Disaster Recovery
domains.description: Backup strategy, cross-region replication, disaster recovery testing, and RTO/RPO definition

domains.name: Compliance and Governance
domains.description: Cloud governance framework, policy as code, audit readiness, and cloud vendor security assessment
